sourcesContent:
// src/pages/subscription/EliteContent.js (updated with new premium features, removing coaching) import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { useSubscription } from '../../contexts/SubscriptionContext'; import FeatureGate from '../../components/subscription/FeatureGate'; import { Users, Video, Shield, Activity, Smartphone, BookOpen, Calendar, Heart, Zap } from 'lucide-react'; const EliteContent = () => { const { formatTierName } = useSubscription(); return (

Elite Content

Welcome to your {formatTierName('elite')} tier! Enjoy our most comprehensive fitness resources with premium features.

{/* AI Powered Training */}

AI-Powered Training

Experience personalized workouts powered by advanced AI technology.

  • • Smart workout recommendations
  • • Adaptive fitness plans
  • • Progress-based adjustments
Start Training
{/* Health Integration Hub */}

Health Integration Hub

Connect your health devices and get comprehensive insights.

  • • Wearable device synchronization
  • • Advanced health metrics dashboard
  • • Sleep and recovery optimization
Connect Devices
{/* Specialized Programs */}

Specialized Programs

Access condition-specific workout programs designed by experts.

  • • Condition-specific programs
  • • Rehabilitation workouts
  • • Post-surgery recovery plans
Browse Programs
{/* Second row of features */}
{/* Exclusive Content Library */}

Premium workout series and pre-release content access.

  • • Expert trainer series
  • • Early access to new workouts
  • • Premium workout collections
Explore Library
{/* Family Plan */}

Multi-User Family Plan

Share your Elite subscription with family members.

  • • Up to 5 family profiles
  • • Family challenges & activities
  • • Shared progress tracking
Manage Family
{/* Advanced Analytics */}

Advanced Analytics

Comprehensive performance tracking and insights.

  • • Detailed fitness metrics
  • • Visual progress charts
  • • Exportable health reports
View Analytics
{/* Elite Resources Section */}

Elite Digital Resources

Access our premium collection of downloadable guides and resources to enhance your fitness journey.

{/* Resource 1 */}

Comprehensive Fitness Guide

Complete guide to senior fitness with detailed exercise instructions.

Download PDF →
{/* Resource 2 */}

Nutrition & Diet Planner

Customizable meal plans and nutrition guidance for active seniors.

Download PDF →
{/* Resource 3 */}

Printable Workout Cards

Convenient exercise cards you can print and use at home.

Download PDF →
{/* Calendar & Upcoming Events */}

Upcoming Elite Events

July 15, 2023 • 2:00 PM EST

Virtual Wellness Workshop

Join our expert trainers for a live discussion on maintaining fitness.

Add to Calendar →

July 22, 2023 • 1:00 PM EST

New Feature Preview

Get a sneak peek at upcoming features and provide feedback.

Add to Calendar →

August 5, 2023 • 11:00 AM EST

Community Challenge Kickoff

Join our month-long fitness challenge with prizes and support.

Add to Calendar →
View Full Calendar
); }; export default EliteContent;
